# truenas_nvmet_global (Data Source)

Fetches the TrueNAS NVMe-oF global configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_nvmet_global" "config" {
}

output "basenqn" {
  value = data.truenas_nvmet_global.config.basenqn
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `ana` (Boolean) Asymmetric Namespace Access.
- `basenqn` (String) NQN prefix used for subsystem creation.
- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the NVMe-oF global configuration.
- `kernel` (Boolean) NVMe-oF backend selection.
- `rdma` (Boolean) RDMA enabled (Enterprise only).
- `xport_referral` (Boolean) Cross-port referral generation.
